response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with genuine strengths in testing, developer tooling, and some impressive high-throughput systems work, but he does not meet the core requirements for this role. The position demands 8 years of C++ experience, while his professional C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments; his low-latency systems work was in DLang. He also lacks formal technical-leadership experience on a cloud compute platform, which is the heart of this role. He would be a strong candidate for a senior full-stack or platform tooling role, but not this one.
strengths: Real high-scale systems experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong testing and quality culture, including open-source test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and years of teaching workshops and courses
Broad polyglot engineering background with DevOps exposure: CI/CD setup, Docker, Kubernetes deployments, and infrastructure tooling
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ minimum — only about seven months of professional C++ work, with systems depth in DLang instead
No formal technical-lead or people-leadership role; mentoring has been through workshops rather than leading engineering teams or setting cross-team direction
Little production cloud architecture or compute-platform experience; recent work centers on product-level full-stack development in TypeScript/Node.js

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal technical leadership and cloud platform ownership
Proven large-scale, low-latency distributed systems work
